Who we are

Regis and Savoy Capital is an independent Multi-Family Office serving entrepreneurs, business owners, professionals, and families through Wealth Management, Private Equity, Family Office, and Legacy and Impact services.

What we offer

Wealth Management

Independent investment guidance tailored to evolving financial goals and market conditions.

Private Equity

Accessing carefully selected private-market opportunities with discipline and perspective.

Family Office

Legacy and Impact

Helping future generations translate success into purpose, values, and lasting impact.

Regis & Savoy Capital

We believe wealth is never just about assets. It is about the opportunities it creates, the responsibilities it brings, and the future it helps shape. Our role is to help families navigate complexity, make informed decisions, and remain focused on what matters most over the long term.

What sets us apart

How we work Request a consultation
N°01

Owner-led relationships

Direct engagement with the decision-makers responsible for managing your wealth.

N°02

Curated client partnerships

We intentionally work with a select group of clients whose values, expectations, and long-term outlook align with our approach.

N°03

Independent perspective

Guidance shaped solely by our clients' interests, without product-sales obligations or institutional influences.

N°04

Multigenerational perspective

Ensuring today's decisions support the aspirations and continuity of future generations.
